title: RG Consultancy Website
description: Corporate website for Reddington Global Consultancy featuring dynamic content, service showcases, SEO-optimized pages, and a modern aesthetic with Framer Motion animations.

caseStudy.problem: The firm needed a modern, performant web presence to attract enterprise clients and establish credibility in the consulting space.
caseStudy.solution: Built a static site generated multi-page application using Next.js with ISR, improving loading times by 40% and achieving perfect Lighthouse scores.

title: RG Care (NGO Platform)
description: Full-featured donation and volunteer management platform for the RG Care non-profit organization, with secure payment processing, real-time dashboards, and transparent expense tracking.

caseStudy.problem: Inefficient tracking of volunteer hours, donations, and organizational expenses across multiple spreadsheets.
caseStudy.solution: Created a centralized dashboard with automated reports, secure Stripe payment gateways, and volunteer management tools.

title: RG US Debt Advisory
description: Financial advisory portal offering intelligent debt management solutions for US clients, featuring complex calculator APIs powered by Python/FastAPI and consumed by a responsive Next.js frontend.

caseStudy.problem: Clients needed an intuitive simulator to restructure their debts and visualize repayment plans before committing.
caseStudy.solution: Developed complex Python-based financial calculator APIs exposed via FastAPI with sub-200ms response times, consumed by a sleek Next.js frontend.

title: Lead Management System
description: Enterprise-grade internal CRM tool optimized for tele-calling teams, improving conversion rates by tracking leads through customizable Kanban-style pipelines with real-time notifications.

caseStudy.problem: Sales team was losing track of potential leads due to fragmented spreadsheet workflows and no standardized follow-up process.
caseStudy.solution: Deployed a robust CRM on AWS EC2 with Nginx reverse proxy, integrating real-time notifications, role-based access, and a scalable MySQL schema.
